description:
You are a log-analyst who has just received a single consolidated log file located at 
    /home/user/logs/server.log.  
    The file already exists on disk and is encoded in UTF-8 (one line per log entry, 
    UNIX newline “\n”).  Each line follows the exact pattern:

        YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ | LEVEL | COMPONENT | IPv4 | FREE-FORM-TEXT

    where
      • LEVEL   ∈ {INFO, WARN, ERROR}  
      • COMPONENT ∈ {API, AUTH, FRONTEND}  
      • IPv4 is always a valid IPv4 address  
      • FREE-FORM-TEXT **always ends with a positive integer immediately followed by “ms” 
        that represents the duration of the operation in milliseconds**.  
        There are no additional “ms” tokens elsewhere in the line.

    Management wants four different derivative artefacts, **all of them must be placed
    inside /home/user/analysis (create the directory if necessary):**

    1.  /home/user/analysis/level_counts.txt  
        • ASCII text, UNIX newline.  
        • Exactly three lines, sorted alphabetically by LEVEL (ERROR, INFO, WARN).  
        • Format of every line:  
              LEVEL<single space>COUNT  
          Example (do **NOT** hard-code these numbers):  
              ERROR 42  
              INFO 314  
              WARN 7

    2.  /home/user/analysis/response_stats.csv  
        • CSV, UTF-8, UNIX newline.  
        • Header must be literally:  
              Component,AverageResponseTimeMs  
        • One subsequent row per component (API, AUTH, FRONTEND), **in that order**.  
        • Average is the arithmetic mean of the duration field (the number that appears
          right before “ms” on each line belonging to the component).  
        • Print the average with exactly one digit after the decimal point 
          (e.g. “235.0”).  
          A sample with dummy numbers:  
              Component,AverageResponseTimeMs  
              API,123.4  
              AUTH,99.0  
              FRONTEND,87.5

    3.  /home/user/analysis/errors_filtered.log  
        • Contains **only** those lines from the original log whose LEVEL is “ERROR”  
          **and** whose COMPONENT is **not** “FRONTEND”.  
        • Preserve the original line order and spacing exactly; do not modify 
          any characters.  
        • UNIX newline at the end of every line.

    4.  /home/user/analysis/server_redacted.log  
        • A copy of /home/user/logs/server.log where every IPv4 address
          is replaced by the literal token “[REDACTED]” (including the brackets).  
        • All other characters—including spacing, the surrounding “ | ” separators,
          timestamps, etc.—must remain byte-for-byte identical to the original.  

    Constraints & hints for the AI agent (NOT commands):  
      • Only the standard POSIX tools available in a minimal Linux environment
        should be necessary (awk, sed, sort, mkdir, etc.).  
      • No root privileges are available, so all outputs must be written
        inside /home/user/analysis with default user permissions.  
      • The agent should make sure each output file is created and
        non-empty before finishing.  
      • All four artefacts will be used by an automated test harness,
        so **filenames, directory names, line order and output formatting
        must be exactly as described**.

    When everything is finished you should be able to run, for example,
        cat /home/user/analysis/level_counts.txt
    and see the three counts, or
        head /home/user/analysis/server_redacted.log
    and notice that every IP address has been replaced by “[REDACTED]”.
truth:
<!--  Ground-truth data used by the automated checker. 
          DO NOT reveal any of this in the public task description. -->

    <!-- 1. Contents of the initial log file that already exists on disk -->
    <initial_file path="/home/user/logs/server.log"><![CDATA[
2023-11-01T12:00:00Z | INFO | API | 10.0.0.1 | Request completed in 150ms
2023-11-01T12:00:01Z | WARN | AUTH | 10.0.0.2 | Password attempt failed 100ms
2023-11-01T12:00:02Z | ERROR | API | 10.0.0.1 | DB connection timeout after 300ms
2023-11-01T12:00:03Z | INFO | FRONTEND | 192.168.1.1 | Page rendered in 80ms
2023-11-01T12:00:04Z | ERROR | AUTH | 10.0.0.3 | Unauthorized access 200ms
2023-11-01T12:00:05Z | INFO | API | 10.0.0.1 | Request completed in 110ms
2023-11-01T12:00:06Z | WARN | FRONTEND | 192.168.1.1 | Slow image load 250ms
2023-11-01T12:00:07Z | ERROR | FRONTEND | 192.168.1.1 | JS exception 90ms
2023-11-01T12:00:08Z | INFO | AUTH | 10.0.0.2 | Login successful 120ms
2023-11-01T12:00:09Z | INFO | API | 10.0.0.4 | Request completed in 140ms
2023-11-01T12:00:10Z | ERROR | API | 10.0.0.4 | Timeout after 400ms
2023-11-01T12:00:11Z | INFO | FRONTEND | 192.168.1.1 | Page rendered in 70ms
2023-11-01T12:00:12Z | WARN | API | 10.0.0.1 | High latency 310ms
2023-11-01T12:00:13Z | INFO | AUTH | 10.0.0.3 | Logout complete 90ms
2023-11-01T12:00:14Z | ERROR | AUTH | 10.0.0.2 | Invalid token 150ms
]]></initial_file>

    <!-- 2. Expected artefacts after the agent has successfully completed the task -->

    <expected_file path="/home/user/analysis/level_counts.txt"><![CDATA[
ERROR 5
INFO 7
WARN 3
]]></expected_file>

    <expected_file path="/home/user/analysis/response_stats.csv"><![CDATA[
Component,AverageResponseTimeMs
API,235.0
AUTH,132.0
FRONTEND,122.5
]]></expected_file>

    <expected_file path="/home/user/analysis/errors_filtered.log"><![CDATA[
2023-11-01T12:00:02Z | ERROR | API | 10.0.0.1 | DB connection timeout after 300ms
2023-11-01T12:00:04Z | ERROR | AUTH | 10.0.0.3 | Unauthorized access 200ms
2023-11-01T12:00:10Z | ERROR | API | 10.0.0.4 | Timeout after 400ms
2023-11-01T12:00:14Z | ERROR | AUTH | 10.0.0.2 | Invalid token 150ms
]]></expected_file>

    <expected_file path="/home/user/analysis/server_redacted.log"><![CDATA[
2023-11-01T12:00:00Z | INFO | API | [REDACTED] | Request completed in 150ms
2023-11-01T12:00:01Z | WARN | AUTH | [REDACTED] | Password attempt failed 100ms
2023-11-01T12:00:02Z | ERROR | API | [REDACTED] | DB connection timeout after 300ms
2023-11-01T12:00:03Z | INFO | FRONTEND | [REDACTED] | Page rendered in 80ms
2023-11-01T12:00:04Z | ERROR | AUTH | [REDACTED] | Unauthorized access 200ms
2023-11-01T12:00:05Z | INFO | API | [REDACTED] | Request completed in 110ms
2023-11-01T12:00:06Z | WARN | FRONTEND | [REDACTED] | Slow image load 250ms
2023-11-01T12:00:07Z | ERROR | FRONTEND | [REDACTED] | JS exception 90ms
2023-11-01T12:00:08Z | INFO | AUTH | [REDACTED] | Login successful 120ms
2023-11-01T12:00:09Z | INFO | API | [REDACTED] | Request completed in 140ms
2023-11-01T12:00:10Z | ERROR | API | [REDACTED] | Timeout after 400ms
2023-11-01T12:00:11Z | INFO | FRONTEND | [REDACTED] | Page rendered in 70ms
2023-11-01T12:00:12Z | WARN | API | [REDACTED] | High latency 310ms
2023-11-01T12:00:13Z | INFO | AUTH | [REDACTED] | Logout complete 90ms
2023-11-01T12:00:14Z | ERROR | AUTH | [REDACTED] | Invalid token 150ms
]]></expected_file>
